homepage.eyebrow: Dandali mai amfani da Hausa a gaba
homepage.title: Tabbatattun bayanan jama'a da bayar da rahoto cikin sirri
homepage.introduction: Ana gina Dandalin Garkuwa domin tallafa wa samun tabbatattun labarai da sanarwar jama'a, tare da wata hanya ta daban ta aika rahoton wani lamari cikin sirri. Fom ɗin rahoto yana samuwa yanzu; aikin labarai yana nan tafe.
homepage.pillarsTitle: Ayyuka biyu da ake shirin samarwa
homepage.pillarsIntroduction: Za a ware bayanan da ake wallafawa ga jama'a daga rahotannin sirri da ma'aikata za su duba.
homepage.newsDescription: Za a wallafa sanarwa, shawarwari, gargaɗi da sabbin bayanan jama'a bayan an bi tsarin tantancewa.
homepage.reportingDescription: Ana samun fom na musamman domin jama'a su aika bayanin wani lamari ba tare da buƙatar asusu ba.
homepage.trustIntroduction: Tsarin da ake shiryawa yana rage buƙatar bayanan mutum, amma ba ya yin alkawarin cewa haɗari ba zai taɓa faruwa ba.
homepage.trustAccounts: Ba za a buƙaci asusun ɗan ƙasa domin aika rahoto ba.
homepage.trustContact: Bayar da bayanan tuntuɓa domin ƙarin bayani zai zama zaɓi.
homepage.trustTracking: Ba za a samar da hanyar bibiyar rahoto a fili ba.
homepage.trustSeparation: Bayanan jama'a da rahotannin sirri za su bi hanyoyin aiki daban-daban.
homepage.stepOneDescription: Duba labarai, sanarwa da shawarwarin jama'a da aka tantance.
homepage.stepTwoDescription: Bayar da muhimman bayanai ta hanyar fom na sirri ba tare da buƙatar asusu ba.
homepage.stepThreeDescription: Ma'aikatan cikin gida za su duba bayanin ta tsarin gudanarwa su ɗauki matakin da ya dace.
homepage.linksDescription: Karanta yadda aka tsara dandalin, abin da ake iya tsammani, da hanyoyin neman taimako.

faq.title: Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi
faq.introduction: Amsoshi game da manufar dandalin da ayyukan da ake shirin samarwa.

items.question: Mene ne Dandalin Garkuwa?
items.answer: Dandali ne da ake ginawa domin tabbatattun bayanan jama'a da kuma wata hanya ta daban ta aika rahoton wani lamari cikin sirri.

items.question: Me ya sa Hausa ce harshen farko?
items.answer: An sa Hausa a gaba domin bayanai su fi sauƙin samu ga al'ummomin da ke amfani da ita a rayuwar yau da kullum.

items.question: Akwai Turanci?
items.answer: Eh. Ana samar da shafukan Turanci a cikin wannan manhaja ɗaya, amma Hausa ce harshen farko na jama'a.

items.question: Za a buƙaci jama'a su buɗe asusu?
items.answer: A'a. Aika rahoto ba ya buƙatar asusun ɗan ƙasa.

items.question: Shin bayanan tuntuɓa dole ne?
items.answer: A'a. Bayar da bayanan tuntuɓa domin yi wa mai rahoto ƙarin tambaya zaɓi ne.

items.question: Za a iya bibiyar rahoto a fili?
items.answer: A'a. Ba a shirin samar da shafin bibiyar rahoto ga jama'a.

items.question: Yaya za a kula da bayanan sirri?
items.answer: An tsara aikin domin takaita bayanan da ake nema da ware rahotanni daga abubuwan da ake wallafawa. Za a ci gaba da nazarin matakan kariya yayin gina aikin.

items.question: Mene ne bambanci tsakanin bayanan jama'a da rahoton wani lamari?
items.answer: Bayanan jama'a za a tantance su kafin wallafawa. Rahoton wani lamari kuma zai shiga tsarin duba bayanan cikin gida, ba za a wallafa shi kai tsaye ba.

items.question: Me ya kamata a yi idan akwai gaggawa?
items.answer: Kada a jira wannan dandali. A tuntubi hukumomin gaggawa da suka dace a yankin da lamarin ya faru.

items.question: Shin labarai da fom ɗin rahoto sun fara aiki?
items.answer: Fom ɗin bayar da rahoto yana samuwa yanzu. Aikin tabbatattun labarai da sanarwa yana nan tafe.

help.title: Taimako
help.introduction: Wannan shafi yana bayyana yadda ake amfani da shafukan da ake da su da kuma fom ɗin bayar da rahoton wani lamari.

sections.title: Amfani da shafin jama'a
sections.body: Yi amfani da babban menu domin komawa shafin farko ko zuwa fom ɗin rahoto, tambayoyi, taimako, bayani da tuntuɓa. Aikin tabbatattun labarai yana nan tafe.

sections.title: Sauya harshe
sections.body: Zaɓi Hausa ko Turanci a saman ko ƙasan shafi. Za a kai ka zuwa shafin da ya yi daidai da wanda kake karantawa.

sections.title: Tsarin bayar da rahoto
sections.body: Mai rahoto zai bayyana abin da ya faru ta fom, sannan ma'aikatan cikin gida su duba bayanin. Ba a buƙatar asusu.

sections.title: Bayanan da ya dace a shirya
sections.body: Ka iya shirya taƙaitaccen bayanin abin da aka gani, lokaci, wuri da dalilin da ya sa bayanin yake da muhimmanci. Kada a ƙara bayanan mutum da ba su da amfani ga lamarin.

sections.title: Bayar da rahoto cikin alhaki
sections.body: A bayar da abin da aka sani ba tare da ƙirƙira zargi ko jefa kai ko wani cikin haɗari ba. Kada a aika kalmar sirri, takardun mutum marasa amfani, ko fayil da ba a da izinin rarrabawa.

sections.title: Gaggawa da tallafi
sections.body: Wannan dandali ba madadin hukumomin gaggawa ba ne. Don tallafi na gama gari, a yi amfani da bayanan tuntuɓa da za a tabbatar a shafin Tuntuɓe mu.

help.reportingInactive: Fom ɗin bayar da rahoto yana samuwa; ba ya bayar da hanyar bibiyar rahoto a fili.

about.title: Game da Dandalin Garkuwa
about.introduction: Ana gina wannan dandali domin taimaka wa jama'a su samu bayani mai amfani da kuma samun hanyar aika rahoton wani lamari cikin tsari.

sections.title: Hausa a gaba, Turanci a matsayin zaɓi
sections.body: An tsara Hausa a matsayin harshen farko domin sauƙaƙa samun bayani. Ana tallafa wa Turanci a cikin manhaja ɗaya, ba a matsayin wata manhaja ta daban ba.

sections.title: Hanyoyin aiki daban-daban
sections.body: Abubuwan da za a wallafa ga jama'a za su bi tsarin tantancewa. Rahotannin sirri kuma za su bi tsarin duba bayanan cikin gida.

sections.title: Amfani da alhaki
sections.body: An tsara dandalin domin tallafa wa aiki mai amfani da haɗin gwiwa da masu ruwa da tsaki na jama'a a Najeriya, ba tare da yin iƙirarin wata amincewar hukuma ba.

sections.title: Gina aiki a hankali
sections.body: Ana samar da tushe da shafukan bayani da farko. Za a ƙara ayyuka ne a matakai bayan an kammala ƙarin bita da gwaji.

contact.title: Tuntuɓe mu
contact.introduction: Za a wallafa tabbatattun bayanan tuntuɓar Gidauniyar Garkuwa a nan bayan an amince da su.
contact.emailPlaceholder: [Za a tabbatar da imel na hukuma]
contact.telephonePlaceholder: [Za a tabbatar da lambar wayar hukuma]
contact.sensitiveWarningTitle: Kada a aika bayanan sirri ta hanyar tuntuɓa ta gama gari
contact.sensitiveWarning: Kada a aika hujjar wani lamari, bayanan sirri ko saƙon gaggawa ta waɗannan hanyoyi. A yi amfani da fom na musamman na rahoto maimakon haka.
contact.noForm: Ba a samar da fom na tuntuɓa ko aika imel kai tsaye a wannan mataki ba.

footer.summary: Ana gina dandali mai amfani da Hausa a gaba domin tabbatattun bayanan jama'a da rahoto cikin sirri.
footer.emergencyText: Kada a jira wannan dandali. A tuntubi hukumomin gaggawa da suka dace a yankinku.
footer.ownership: Gidauniyar Garkuwa. An tanadi wannan dandalin domin bayanan jama'a.

accessibility.currentLanguage: Harshen da ake amfani da shi

trust.title: Bayani kan amana da sirri
trust.body: An tsara fom ɗin rahoto domin takaita bayanan da ake nema. Kada a aika bayanan sirri ta hanyoyin tuntuɓa na gama gari.

featureStatus.notActive: Fom ɗin rahoto yana samuwa; aikin tabbatattun labarai yana nan tafe.

metadata.homeDescription: Dandali mai amfani da Hausa a gaba da ake ginawa domin tabbatattun bayanan jama'a da rahoto cikin sirri.
metadata.faqDescription: Amsoshi game da Dandalin Garkuwa da ayyukan da ake shirin samarwa.
metadata.helpDescription: Jagorar amfani da Dandalin Garkuwa da bayanin tsarin rahoto na gaba.
metadata.aboutDescription: Manufa, harsuna da tsarin aikin Dandalin Garkuwa.
metadata.contactDescription: Bayanan tuntuɓar Gidauniyar Garkuwa da gargadin amfani da hanyoyin da suka dace.
metadata.reportIncidentDescription: Aika bayanin wani lamari cikin sirri ba tare da buƙatar asusu ba.

incidentReport.title: Bayar da rahoton wani lamari
incidentReport.introduction: Yi amfani da wannan fom domin aika bayanin wani lamari ga Gidauniyar Garkuwa don dubawa a cikin gida. Ba sai ka buɗe asusu ba.
incidentReport.privacyBody: Bayanan tuntuɓa zaɓi ne. Kada ka saka bayanan kanka ko na wani da ba su da muhimmanci ga lamarin. Ana kula da bayanai cikin tsari, amma ba za mu yi alkawarin cewa babu wani haɗari kwata-kwata ba.
incidentReport.emergencyTitle: Wannan ba sabis na gaggawa ba ne
incidentReport.emergencyBody: Idan akwai haɗari nan take, kada ka jira amsa daga wannan dandali. Tuntuɓi hukumomin gaggawa da suka dace a yankinka.
incidentReport.outcomeNotice: Ma'aikatan Gidauniyar za su duba rahoton a cikin gida. Aika rahoto ba ya tabbatar da wani takamaiman sakamako, kuma babu hanyar bibiyarsa a fili.

sections.contact: Bayanan tuntuɓa domin ƙarin bayani (zaɓi ne)

fields.categoryHelp: Zaɓi nau'in da ya fi dacewa da abin da ya faru.
fields.descriptionHelp: Faɗi abin da ya faru, lokacin da wurin da ya faru, da abin da ka sani. Kada ka saka bayanan mutum da ba su da amfani.
fields.severityHelp: Wannan kimantawarka ce; ma'aikata na iya sake duba ta.
fields.locationHelp: Ba sai ka bayar da cikakken adireshi ba.
fields.coordinatesHelp: Idan ka san su, ka bayar da latitud da longitud tare. Ba za mu nemi wurin na'urarka kai tsaye ba.
fields.contactEnabled: Ina son a iya tuntubata domin ƙarin bayani
fields.contactHelp: Idan ka zaɓa, bayanan tuntuɓarka za a rufa su kafin adanawa kuma za a yi amfani da su ne kawai domin yiwuwar ƙarin bayani. Bayar da su yana nufin rahoton bai zama marar suna gaba ɗaya ba.
fields.name: Suna
fields.preferredContactMethod: Hanyar tuntuɓa da ka fi so
fields.safeContactInstructions: Umarnin yadda za a tuntube ka cikin aminci
fields.safeContactInstructionsHelp: Misali, lokutan da ya fi dacewa a kira. Kada ka saka kalmar sirri.
fields.consent: Na yarda a tuntube ni domin ƙarin bayani game da wannan rahoto.

categories.error: Ba a iya loda nau'ikan lamari ba. Ka sake gwadawa.
categories.empty: Babu nau'in lamari da aka amince da shi a yanzu.

validation.summaryTitle: Akwai abin da ya kamata a gyara kafin a aika rahoton.
validation.descriptionMin: Bayani ya zama aƙalla haruffa 20 bayan cire sararin farko da na ƙarshe.
validation.locationMax: Bayanin wuri bai wuce haruffa 500 ba.
validation.stateMax: Sunan jiha bai wuce haruffa 100 ba.
validation.lgaMax: Sunan ƙaramar hukuma bai wuce haruffa 100 ba.
validation.coordinatesPair: Dole a bayar da latitud da longitud tare.
validation.latitude: Latitud ya zama lamba tsakanin -90 da 90.
validation.longitude: Longitud ya zama lamba tsakanin -180 da 180.
validation.instructionsMax: Umarnin tuntuɓa bai wuce haruffa 500 ba.
validation.contactRequired: Bayar da lambar waya ko imel idan kana son a tuntube ka.
validation.preferredPhone: Ana buƙatar lambar waya idan ita ce hanyar da ka fi so.
validation.preferredEmail: Ana buƙatar imel idan shi ne hanyar da ka fi so.
validation.consent: Dole ka amince kafin a adana bayanan tuntuɓa.

errors.validation: Wasu bayanai ba su inganta ba. Ka duba wuraren da aka nuna.
errors.payloadTooLarge: Rahoton ya yi girma fiye da abin da za a iya karɓa. Ka taƙaita bayanin ka sake gwadawa.
errors.unsupportedMedia: Ba a iya aika wannan nau'in bayani ba.
errors.rateLimit: An samu yawan yunƙurin aika rahoto. Ka jira kaɗan kafin ka sake gwadawa.
errors.network: Ba a iya haɗawa da sabis ɗin rahoto. Ka duba haɗin intanet ka sake gwadawa.
errors.timeout: Aika rahoton ya ɗauki lokaci mai tsawo. Ka sake gwadawa idan haɗin ya daidaita.
errors.server: Ba a iya karɓar rahoton a yanzu. Ka sake gwadawa daga baya.

success.title: An karɓi rahotonka
success.body: An karɓi rahoton domin dubawa a cikin gida. Ba a samar da lambar bibiyar jama'a ba.

admin.title: Sashen gudanarwa
admin.placeholder: Ba a fara gina sashen gudanarwa ba tukuna.

login.title: Shiga sashen gudanarwa
login.description: Yi amfani da asusun ma'aikacin Gidauniyar Garkuwa da aka amince da shi.
login.invalidCredentials: Ba a iya shiga da waɗannan bayanai ba.
login.tooManyAttempts: An yi yunƙurin shiga sau da yawa. Jira kaɗan kafin sake gwadawa.
login.sessionExpired: Zaman aikinka ya ƙare. Sake shiga domin ci gaba.
login.networkError: Ba a iya haɗawa da sabis ɗin shiga ba. Sake gwadawa.
login.securityNotice: Kada ka raba kalmar sirrinka. Ba a buƙatar kalmar sirri ta hanyar saƙo ko kiran waya daga wannan shafin.

landing.title: Sashen gudanarwa
landing.description: An kammala tushen shiga na ma'aikata. Ba a ƙara kayan gudanar da rahoto ko wasu ayyukan dashboard ba tukuna.
landing.logoutError: Ba a iya kammala fita ba. Sake gwadawa.
